title: NIT Trichy Global Group is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: NIT Trichy Global Group is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
NIT Trichy Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NIT Trichy Global Group:
NIT Trichy Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIT Trichy Global Group!
